message:
fix(random): loop arc4random_buf on getrandom short reads (bd-ubkl7)

arc4random_buf previously discarded sys_getrandom's return value,
so a short read (possible for nbytes > 256 when a signal interrupts
the syscall) left the tail of the caller's buffer uninitialized —
a security defect for any consumer using arc4random_buf for key
material or nonces.

Fix: loop until all nbytes bytes have been written, retrying on
EINTR and bailing out on persistent errors. Null and zero-size
requests are explicit no-ops.

Three regression tests: 1 KiB sentinel test, zero-size no-op,
null-pointer no-op.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
